sections.title: Before completion of Monkey Madness II

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Welcome to my private little wyvern area.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: I'm Steve. You may have heard of my big cousin Nieve - she's one of the Slayer Masters. She's the famous one in the family. But Nieve's not here - this area's mine

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is this wyvern area private?

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Because I say so! My cousin Nieve thinks she's so great because she's got a big cave where she can boss people around. So I carved some steps out of the ice, and made myself a training area here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So are you a Slayer Master?

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: No, I'm not. My cousin Nieve is a Slayer Master. There's nothing special about her, you know. All she does is tell people to kill stuff. That's Slayer Masters for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, goodbye.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: 'Ello, and what are you after then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another assignment.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Excellent, you're doing great. Your new task is to kill [amount] [task monster].

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: You're still hunting [monster]; you have [amount] to go. Come back when you've finished your task.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: You're still hunting [monster], with [amount] to go.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please cancel it.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks, I want to try doing it.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any rewards for me, or anything to trade?

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about the difficulty of my assignments.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: The Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I can handle any task.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: That's the spirit.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In future, please don't give anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: The Slayer Masters will take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so you shouldn't get anything too hard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's fine - I don't want anything too tough.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Okay, we'll keep checking your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Stop checking my combat level - I can take anything!

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Okay, from now on, all the Slayer Masters will assign you anything from their lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see you're the new Slayer Master here.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Yes, Nieve used to be the local Slayer Master - she's my cousin. She's gone off somewhere now, so I'm taking over.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How sad for you.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Yes, Nieve used to be the local Slayer Master - she was my cousin. We weren't particularly close, but I came here straight away to take over the job.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: I'd hoped I'd receive a shield like Nieve's when I took over her job, but I've not been given one so far. I guess the perks of the job aren't what they used to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How sad for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Nothing...

sections.title: Before the update Game Improvements (26 March 2020)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: 'Ello, who's that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [player name]. I'm using my magic to communicate with you.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Bizarre, go on, what do you want then?

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: 'Ello, can I help you?

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: Is there? I don't think so, try again.

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: I believe you're right!

lines.speaker: Steve
lines.text: I love farming, but I need some help!

sections.title: Using the elysian spirit shield (Monkey Madness II) on Steve
